case_title: 324 LARKIN C1, LP. VS. JORDAN DONOVAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 324 LARKIN C1, LP. AS TO DEFENDANT DONOVAN, JORDAN AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 324 LARKIN C1, LP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONOVAN, JORDAN AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 324 LARKIN STREET, #25 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 324 LARKIN C1, LP. AS TO DEFENDANT DONOVAN, JORDAN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $59.63 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF 324 LARKIN C1, LP.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
